summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open, non-security PRs. No merge is recommended because none has complete merge preflight proof with a clean Codex /review and resolved review state. No executable fix artifact is emitted because the available blockers are maintainer-review or merge-preflight blockers, not complete narrow repair specs.

actions.reason: Independent maintainer-ready dependency PR; keep open because merge requires maintainer review and complete merge_preflight proof.
Independent Feishu fix PR; keep open because a failing relevant check and missing complete merge preflight block merge.
Independent Telegram fix PR; keep open because it lacks complete merge preflight and has an existing maintainer update/review gate.
Independent compatibility-affecting memory-core feature PR; keep open for maintainer review rather than merge without complete preflight.
Independent macOS daemon fix PR; keep open because unresolved ClawSweeper findings and compatibility/availability risk block merge recommendation.
